microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, API-driven self-service model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable model for continuous enterprise-grade validation.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, coordinating across engineering, product, and partner stakeholders.

Built an **internal AI agent** for drill planning and restructured automation workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly accelerating enterprise customer outcomes at scale.
microsoft_2023: Championed **developer adoption** of AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting live demos and onboarding sessions that drove utilization across 14 Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly through improved developer tooling.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based **YAML generation** by facilitating 11+ structured user interviews with Azure engineering teams to surface critical feature gaps and prioritize high-impact improvements.

Improved developer experience by implementing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and accelerating onboarding for internal platform consumers.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ engineering and service teams.

Defined a product strategy to reduce operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap to automate critical deployment paths.

Enabled leadership to target automation gaps by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** that tracked operational toil and surfaced high-impact support priorities across 140+ teams, directly informing roadmap decisions.

Translated complex, multi-team workflow data into clear executive presentations and written guides, building shared understanding across engineering, product, and business stakeholders on automation ROI and prioritization trade-offs.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by authoring the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and aligning engineering and operations on a phased deployment plan.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across cross-functional engineering teams.

Drove alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual handoffs that blocked developer productivity.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM process, reducing friction and improving conversion across the customer pipeline.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to improve discoverability and developer-style self-serve access.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying and sealing margin leaks through data-driven recommendations that informed future pricing strategy.
